title: CREATE UDT
body: UDTs are tag templates. Define once, instantiate many. A Motor UDT with Amps/Speed/Running/Fault creates identical structures for every motor.
code:
UDT: Motor
  Parameters:
    tagPath: "" (OPC base path)
  Members:
    Amps      Float8   → {tagPath}/Amps
    Speed     Float8   → {tagPath}/Speed
    Running   Boolean  → {tagPath}/Running
    Fault     Boolean  → {tagPath}/Fault
    RunHours  Float8   → {tagPath}/RunHours
    HOA       Int4     → {tagPath}/HOA
    Alarms/   (nested AlarmSet UDT)

Nested:
  Pump  extends Motor + Flow, Pressure
  Tank  contains Valve, Motor, PID, AlarmSet
key: Edit the def → all instances update
mistakes: Individual tags instead of UDTs (manual labor)
Flat tags instead of nested UDTs
